fates: having their jugular opened by a ceiling fan blade that worked loose while they slept
being scalded to death when a faulty water heater relief valve blew and directed a jet of superheated steam at them in the shower
being strangled by a retractable vacuum cord that caught around their throat when the machine switched off and retracted
falling out a window after a snapped guitar string sliced their eyes open during a routine tuning
drowning face-down in a shallow utility sink after a carbon monoxide leak from a cracked furnace exchanger rendered them unconscious
being bisected at the waist by a garage door whose torsion spring snapped under full tension
having their skull fractured by a single falling ceiling tile dislodged by a burst pipe in the apartment above
being eviscerated by a riding lawnmower's blade deck after the dead-man switch failed and the machine reversed over them
being decapitated when a snapped clothesline cable whipped across a neighbor's yard at throat height
being pulled feet-first through an industrial conveyor belt after a shoelace caught in the intake roller
being crushed to death in a walk-in cooler when the heavy door's pneumatic hinge malfunctioned and the latch engaged while they were inside
having their neck broken by a coiling fire hose that rocketed off a standpipe reel when the valve was opened too quickly
being incinerated when a build-up of flour dust in a commercial bakery ignited from a pilot light they didn't know was on
being flayed by a burst hydraulic line on a forklift that pressurized to the point of rupture against their forearm
being decapitated by a counter-rotating industrial mixer blade after leaning in to scrape the bowl
being crushed under a shelf unit in a warehouse that toppled in a chain reaction started by a single misloaded pallet
having their arm degloved and then being drawn headfirst into a commercial laundry mangle
being disemboweled by a pneumatic nail gun that misfired when a power surge tripped the safety lockout
having their femoral artery severed by a circular saw blade that shattered and expelled a fragment at ballistic velocity
being bisected by a guardrail that punched through their windshield when the car ahead tapped it at low speed
being decapitated through an open sunroof by a sheet of roofing tin that peeled off a passing flatbed
having their chest collapsed by an airbag that deployed spontaneously while the car was parked and they were leaning across the center console
being pulled under and shredded by a boat propeller after falling from the stern while the engine was still engaged
being immolated in their car seat when an errant spark from roadside grinding work ignited a slow fuel leak they hadn't noticed
being impaled through the sternum by a snapped fencepost driven by a transit bus jumping the curb
having their skull crushed by a mail collection box that was struck by a delivery van and launched horizontally across the sidewalk
being decapitated by a revolving door that accelerated violently when a power surge overrode the speed limiter
drowning in two feet of water in a public fountain after a slip knocked them unconscious against the basin lip
being mostly flattened when a hundred-pound manhole cover was launched by igniting sewer gas during maintenance work
being eviscerated by a shattered plate-glass window that exploded outward from internal pressure during a building fire across the street
having their throat crushed by an elevator door that closed on them mid-step when the proximity sensor was blocked by a dropped umbrella
being struck fatally in the temple by a golf ball that skipped off a cart path, cleared a fence, and traveled three blocks
a steel I-beam swung off a crane hook and punched an 'H' shaped hole through them skull to groin when the load line frayed against a building edge
being buried alive in wet concrete when a foundation form burst and they were standing downhill in the pour zone
having their head driven into their chest cavity by a scaffold plank that fell edge-on from four stories up
being shredded by a concrete core drill that broke off its mount
being decapitated by a discus that deflected off a throwing cage post at an inverted angle
having their ribcage caved in by a snapped high-tension rowing oar that recoiled across the boat they were on
being impaled through the back by a javelin that bounced off frozen ground at a low trajectory and reversed direction
being scalped and then strangled by their own hair caught in the motor of a jet ski they were swimming alongside
being injected with a fatal air embolism when a faulty IV pump pressurized the line and forced the drip bag contents at once
suffocating when an automated hospital bed adjusted into a position that compressed their trachea against the side rail during the night
being electrocuted when a grounded medical imaging unit developed a fault and the current ran through the wet floor where they were standing
being driven through by a section of aluminum irrigation pipe that a microburst lifted and hurled across an open field
being struck through the eye by a fence staple that a lawnmower ejected at close range
having a single tile shaken loose from a roof by a minor tremor strike them crown-first at terminal velocity
being strangled by a kite string that wrapped around their throat when a line snap sent the spool spinning at speed
having their throat perforated by a pressure cooker valve plug that ejected when the seal degraded and the pot was overfilled
being decapitated when a commercial dough sheeter's safety guard was removed for cleaning and someone switched it on remotely
being scalded and then drowned in the industrial dishwasher cycle they fell into when the floor drain backed up and the door latched automatically
